title: stelis verruculosa
intro: Stelis verruculosa, also known as the warty stelis, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Stelis verruculosa include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Stelis verruculosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
